name: TransactionPartnerUser
description: Describes a transaction with a user.

fields.name: type
fields.description: Type of the transaction partner, always “user”

fields.name: transaction_type
fields.description: Type of the transaction, currently one of “invoice_payment” for payments via invoices, “paid_media_payment” for payments for paid media, “gift_purchase” for gifts sent by the bot, “premium_purchase” for Telegram Premium subscriptions gifted by the bot, “business_account_transfer” for direct transfers from managed business accounts

fields.name: affiliate
fields.description: Information about the affiliate that received a commission via this transaction. Can be available only for “invoice_payment” and “paid_media_payment” transactions.

fields.name: invoice_payload
fields.description: Bot-specified invoice payload. Can be available only for “invoice_payment” transactions.

fields.name: subscription_period
fields.description: The duration of the paid subscription. Can be available only for “invoice_payment” transactions.

fields.name: paid_media
fields.description: Information about the paid media bought by the user; for “paid_media_payment” transactions only

fields.name: paid_media_payload
fields.description: Bot-specified paid media payload. Can be available only for “paid_media_payment” transactions.

fields.name: gift
fields.description: The gift sent to the user by the bot; for “gift_purchase” transactions only

fields.name: premium_subscription_duration
fields.description: Number of months the gifted Telegram Premium subscription will be active for; for “premium_purchase” transactions only
